requirements.summary: Prepare and verify the frontend application for public deployment with correct canister configuration and production-ready settings
acceptanceCriteria: The application is deployed and accessible via a public URL.
All existing features (Risk Predictor, X-Ray Analysis, Dashboard, History) are fully functional on the deployed version.
The backend canister is live and responds to frontend queries correctly.

file_operations.description: Verify the canister ID configuration points to the correct deployed backend canister. Ensure the actor initialization logic correctly handles production environment URLs and canister IDs. Confirm the authentication flow with Internet Identity works in the deployed environment.

Verify the base HTML template includes correct meta tags for production deployment. Ensure the asset paths and module references are compatible with the ICP hosting environment. Confirm the root div and script references are production-ready.

Verify the application entry point correctly initializes all providers (QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider) for production deployment. Ensure error boundaries and production-safe configurations are in place.

Verify the router configuration and all four routes (Risk Predictor, X-Ray Analysis, Dashboard, History) are correctly wired for deployment. Ensure the shared layout components render correctly in production with proper asset loading.
